headline: Influencer's 'Day In My Life' Video Shows Her Watching Her Own 'Day In My Life' Video
summary: The video is 47 seconds of inception-level content. Her followers are confused but still watching.
fullBody: Brittany Recurse posted a 'day in my life' vlog that consisted entirely of her watching her previous 'day in my life' vlog. 'It's meta,' Brittany explained. 'I'm reflecting on reflection.' The video has 2 million views. Her previous video now has 3 million views from people trying to understand the timeline. Brittany's next video will be her watching herself watch herself watch herself. The simulation is glitching.
